description: A customer wants to cancel their recurring monthly subscription for a product.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the recurring subscription for 'Vitamin D'.

nodes.task_description: Process the cancellation of the subscription.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully updates the subscription status to 'Cancelled'.

nodes.task_description: Confirm with the customer that the subscription is cancelled and no future charges will be made.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides clear confirmation to the customer.
